title: Life Map Compact
subtitle: Compact Mermaid visualization package for archive and review
purpose: Render a stable Mermaid diagram into reusable artifacts and publish the context into the Knowledge Cards database.
usage: Run scripts/visual-flow.sh render final_life_map_compact.mmd to generate png, pdf, and svg artifacts.
Run scripts/visual-flow.sh publish final_life_map_compact.mmd visuals/templates/meta.example.json to create the Notion page.
Run scripts/visual-flow.sh all final_life_map_compact.mmd visuals/templates/meta.example.json to package both steps.
questions: What is this diagram intended to explain at a glance?
Which artifact should I use for chat review versus long-form archive?
If the structure changes, which Mermaid source should be updated first?
